title: evolvulus purpusii
intro: Evolvulus purpusii, also known as the Mexican bluecrown or Mexican evolvulus, is a flowering plant species native to Mexico and Central America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Evolvulus purpusii include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and soothing respiratory problems. Evolvulus purpusii can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion by steeping the flowers or leaves in hot water, making it a popular natural remedy in some regions.
